---
title: "Escaping Inequality in India: Role of English-Medium Instruction"
author: "Rishav Roy"
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
bibliography: references.bib
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| results: asis
legacy_path <- "../archive/legacy-paper-drafts/580-Draft-ECON-580.Rmd"
legacy <- readLines(legacy_path, warn = FALSE)
legacy <- paste(legacy, collapse = "\n")

strip_code_chunks <- function(x) {
  lines <- strsplit(x, "\n", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
  out <- character()
  in_chunk <- FALSE
  for (line in lines) {
    if (startsWith(line, "```")) {
      in_chunk <- !in_chunk
      next
    }
    if (!in_chunk) out <- c(out, line)
  }
  paste(out, collapse = "\n")
}

extract_between <- function(x, start, end = NULL) {
  start_pos <- regexpr(start, x, perl = TRUE)
  if (start_pos < 0) stop("Could not find: ", start, call. = FALSE)
  if (is.null(end)) return(substr(x, start_pos, nchar(x)))
  rest <- substr(x, start_pos + attr(start_pos, "match.length"), nchar(x))
  end_pos <- regexpr(end, rest, perl = TRUE)
  if (end_pos < 0) return(substr(x, start_pos, nchar(x)))
  substr(x, start_pos, start_pos + attr(start_pos, "match.length") + end_pos - 2)
}

wrap_section <- function(x, start_heading, end_heading, attrs) {
  start <- regexpr(start_heading, x, fixed = TRUE)
  if (start < 0) stop("Could not find heading: ", start_heading, call. = FALSE)
  if (is.null(end_heading)) {
    end <- nchar(x) + 1L
  } else {
    rest <- substr(x, start + attr(start, "match.length"), nchar(x))
    end_rel <- regexpr(end_heading, rest, fixed = TRUE)
    end <- if (end_rel < 0) nchar(x) + 1L else start + attr(start, "match.length") + end_rel - 1L
  }
  paste0(
    substr(x, 1L, start - 1L),
    "::: {", attrs, "}\n",
    trimws(substr(x, start, end - 1L), which = "right"),
    "\n:::\n\n",
    substr(x, end, nchar(x))
  )
}

escape_inline_r <- function(x) {
  gsub("`r ([^`]+)`", "\\\\`r \\1\\\\`", x, perl = TRUE)
}

body <- strip_code_chunks(legacy)
body <- sub("^---.*?---", "", body, perl = TRUE)
main <- extract_between(
  body,
  "^# Introduction and Literature Review \\{#intro\\}",
  "^# \\(APPENDIX\\) Appendix"
)
appendix <- extract_between(
  body,
  "^# \\(APPENDIX\\) Appendix",
  "^# Technical Note for Replication"
)
technical <- extract_between(
  body,
  "^# Technical Note for Replication",
  "^# References"
)

out <- paste(main, appendix, technical, sep = "\n\n")
markers <- list(
  list("### District Matching Method {#distma}", "### Spatial Autocorrelation, Spatial Spillovers, and Migration {#spa}", '.sample-excerpt #ws-district-harmonization-method sets="writing-5pg writing-10pg" order="8"'),
  list("## Discussion {#disc}", "# (APPENDIX) Appendix {-}", '.sample-excerpt #ws-second-stage-results sets="writing-5pg writing-10pg" order="6"'),
  list("## Results {#iv-results}", "## Discussion {#disc}", '.sample-excerpt #ws-first-stage-results sets="writing-10pg" order="5"'),
  list("## Instrumental Variable {#iv-iv}", "## Results {#iv-results}", '.sample-excerpt #ws-iv-relevance-exclusion-problem sets="writing-5pg writing-10pg" order="3"'),
  list("# The Effect of EMIE: 2SLS Estimation and Main Results {#iv}", "## Instrumental Variable {#iv-iv}", '.sample-excerpt #ws-2sls-limits-remedies sets="writing-10pg" order="4"'),
  list("# The Composition of Education Participation {#heckman}", "# The Effect of EMIE: 2SLS Estimation and Main Results {#iv}", '.sample-excerpt #ws-selection-model-missingness sets="writing-10pg" order="2"'),
  list("# Introduction and Literature Review {#intro}", "# Data Sources {#data}", '.sample-excerpt #ws-intro-question-contribution sets="writing-5pg writing-10pg" order="1"')
)
for (m in markers) out <- wrap_section(out, m[[1]], m[[2]], m[[3]])
out <- escape_inline_r(out)
cat(out)
```
